title: Invincible (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Invincible''''' can refer to several starships:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Invincible]]''''', a [[Providence-class Dreadnought|''Providence''-class Dreadnought]] commanded by [[Admiral]] [[Trench]]
*'''''[[Invincible Faith]]''''', an [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' Type Heavy Star Cruiser]] used the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Invincible/Legends|'''''Invincible''''']], a [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Trench/Legends|Trench]]
*[[Invincible (Stark Hyperspace War)|'''''Invincible''''']], a [[Republic light assault cruiser]] destroyed at the [[First Battle of Qotile]]
*[[Invincible (Strike Fear)|'''''Invincible''''']], an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that led [[Operation Strike Fear]]
*[[Invincible (Star Destroyer)|'''''Invincible''''']], a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vanko]]
*[[Invincible (Imperial-class)|'''''Invincible''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Zasm Katth]] and [[Baddon Fass]]
*[[Invincible (Tartan-class)|'''''Invincible''''']], a [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser]]
*The [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|'''''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser''']]

==Out of universe==
*'''''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''''', a novel
